mapper.select: select count(1) from adi_knowledge_base_item where is_deleted = false and create_time between #{beginTime} and #{endTime}
select count(1) from adi_knowledge_base_item where is_deleted = false
select count(1) from adi_knowledge_base_item a inner join adi_knowledge_base b on a.kb_id = b.id where a.is_deleted = false and a.uuid = #{uuid} and (b.owner_id = #{userId} or b.is_public = true)
